text.title: ci-prod-readiness-gates Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the ci-prod-readiness-gates methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-gates
step.action: Pick gates from the 6-set applicable to this repo.

step.name: author-workflow
step.action: Author workflow YAML calling each gate; reference budget_file (no magics).

step.name: ship-shadow-mode
step.action: Set continue-on-error: true for new gates; collect 14 days of noise.
step.decision-gate: If noise rate > 10% after 14d, fix the gate before flipping to blocking.

step.name: flip-to-blocking-and-document-exception-path
step.action: Remove continue-on-error per gate; document the `gate-exception` label path.
